overrides.expect: \begin{array}{l} \text {Lorentz velocity} \\ \text {transformation} \\ (\text {velocity in S in terms} \\ \text {of velocity in S ^ {\prime }}): \\ \text {Speed of light in vacuum} \end{array} \quad \begin{array}{l} x \text {-velocity of object in frame S} \\ v _ {x} = \frac {v _ {x} ^ {\prime} + u}{1 + u v _ {x} ^ {\prime} / c ^ {2}} \\ \text {Velocity of S ^ {\prime}} \\ \text {relative to S in} \\ \text {positive direction} \\ \text {along x - x ^ {\prime} -axis} \end{array}
overrides.new: \begin{array}{l} \text {Lorentz velocity} \\ \text {transformation} \\ (\text {velocity in S in terms} \\ \text {of velocity in S'}): \\ \text {Speed of light in vacuum} \end{array} \quad \begin{array}{l} x \text {-velocity of object in frame S} \\ v _ {x} = \frac {v _ {x} ^ {\prime} + u}{1 + u v _ {x} ^ {\prime} / c ^ {2}} \\ \text {Velocity of S'} \\ \text {relative to S in} \\ \text {positive direction} \\ \text {along x - x' -axis} \end{array}

overrides.expect: \begin{array}{l l} & \text {Wavelength of} \\ & \text {scattered radiation} \end{array} \quad \begin{array}{l l} & \text {Wavelength of} \\ & \text {incident radiation} \end{array} \quad \text {Planck's constant} \\ \text {Compton} \\ \text {scattering:} & \lambda^ {\prime} - \lambda = \frac {h}{m c} (1 - \cos \phi) \quad \text {Scattering} \\ & \text {angle} \\ & \text {Electron rest mass} \quad \text {Speed of light in vacuum} \end{array}
overrides.new: \begin{array}{l l} & \text {Wavelength of} \\ & \text {scattered radiation} \end{array} \quad \begin{array}{l l} & \text {Wavelength of} \\ & \text {incident radiation} \end{array} \quad \begin{array}{l l} \text {Planck's constant} \\ \text {Compton} \\ \text {scattering:} & \lambda^{\prime} - \lambda = \frac {h}{m c} (1 - \cos \phi) \quad \text {Scattering} \\ & \text {angle} \\ & \text {Electron rest mass} \quad \text {Speed of light in vacuum} \end{array}

overrides.expect: \begin{array}{l} \text {Lorentz velocity} \\ \text {transformation} \\ (\text {velocity in S^{\prime} in terms} \\ \text {of velocity in S}): \\ \text {Speed of light in vacuum} \end{array} \quad \begin{array}{l} x \text {-velocity of object in frame S^{\prime}} \\ v _ {x} ^ {\prime} = \frac {v _ {x} - u}{1 - u v _ {x} / c ^ {2}} \\ \text {Velocity of S^{\prime}} \\ \text {relative to S in} \\ \text {positive direction} \\ \text {along x - x^{\prime} -axis} \end{array}
overrides.new: \begin{array}{l} \text {Lorentz velocity} \\ \text {transformation} \\ (\text {velocity in } S^{\prime} \text { in terms} \\ \text {of velocity in } S): \\ \text {Speed of light in vacuum} \end{array} \quad \begin{array}{l} x \text {-velocity of object in frame } S^{\prime} \\ v _ {x} ^ {\prime} = \frac {v _ {x} - u}{1 - u v _ {x} / c ^ {2}} \\ \text {Velocity of } S^{\prime} \\ \text {relative to } S \\ \text {in} \\ \text {positive direction} \\ \text {along } x - x ^ {\prime} -axis \end{array}
